details.test: Task 1: In-person Wednesday evening meeting within 5 miles saved to plan
Task 2: Highly rated evening meeting added to plan
Task 3: Three coping-with-cravings articles saved to reading list
Task 4: Affordable relapse prevention workshop registration
Task 5: Weekly schedule with three evening meetings of different focuses
Task 6: Self-assessment submission and favoriting two recommended groups
Task 7: Facilitator contacted via on-site message form
Task 8: Two nationwide 24/7 all-substance hotlines added to Quick Contacts
Task 9: Two early recovery stories saved to My Notes
